note: The initial grep for Drizzle .all()/.run() over-counted by ~70%. Effect service calls (env.all(), auth.all(), authSvc.all()), Promise.all(), sync.run(), and Effect.run() were all picked up as Drizzle matches. For future migration greps, filter by files that actually import from drizzle-orm. The lane-owner cartographers correctly identified the false positives in every lane — the up-front estimate was double the real count.

Background lane-owners were interrupted on first launch (all 9 had to be relaunched). This happened twice with PG-004 later. The interruption pattern seems to happen when new tasks are launched in quick succession — the system may need to wait for task registration to complete before background execution starts reliably. Also, the scout for plugin compat returned empty on first attempt with no error — a retry with more explicit output format worked.
